name: architecture-service-designer
description: Service-structure architecture assistant for turning bounded domain models into component and service candidates, responsibilities, collaborations, dependency rules, and service diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Designs service and component structure from domain boundaries.
interface.longDescription: Architecture Service Designer turns requirements, scope boundaries, and domain models into a top-level service or component structure. It identifies service candidates, module candidates, responsibilities, source-of-truth ownership, public and internal contract boundaries, collaboration styles, sync versus async interaction choices, consistency and transaction boundaries, dependency direction rules, adapters, anti-corruption layers, operational ownership, and service diagrams without prematurely choosing database schemas, cloud topology, or low-level endpoint details.
defaultPrompt: Use $architecture-service-designer:architecture-service-designer to design service and component boundaries for this bounded domain.
Use $architecture-service-designer:responsibility-boundary-designer to assign responsibilities and source-of-truth ownership.
Use $architecture-service-designer:service-diagrammer to create a component or service collaboration diagram.
